buildCommand: cd web && if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun install && bun run build; else npm install && npm run build; fi
installCommand: cd web && if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun install; else npm install; fi
devCommand: cd web && if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun run dev; else npm run dev; fi
